description: Implement automated Conductor validation and lifecycle gates
known_blockers: Validator command does not exist yet.
GitHub remote checks require authenticated gh access.
Current worktree has unrelated dirty files and previous git index lock permission failures that must be reported, not hidden.
expected_blockers: CI integration should wait until local fixtures prove deterministic pass and fail behavior.
Windows and OneDrive filesystem state can create stale-lock or permission false positives.
blocker_owner: track implementer until reassigned in Phase 0
fallback_path: Keep manual JSON, Phase 0, and git hygiene validation documented until the automated validator is implemented.

restricted_payload_policy.commit_policy: validator reads Conductor metadata and plans only; it must not read or commit ontology payloads
required_evidence: local-only manifest if any restricted source is touched
redaction or exclusion proof before commit

fail_fast_probe.scope: one passing fixture plus failing fixtures for missing metadata, missing Phase 0, unresolved restricted source, and stale delivery fragment
success_criteria: each failing fixture fails for the expected reason

evidence_score_policy.promotion_rule: no ontology or LLM signal promotes a translation without human review
